prompt: Create a cinematic retro anime illustration of a young woman leaning against a classic car on a palm-lined street at sunset, with a neon motel sign in the background reading Endless SUMMER and a smaller red sign reading “VACANCY.” The scene should feel like an 1980s city-pop summer postcard in teal, cyan, magenta, and hot pink lighting. The woman has short messy black bob hair, a relaxed confident pose, one hand in her trousers pocket, wearing a glossy dark bomber jacket with floral embroidery on the chest and a small sleeve patch, a loose white T-shirt, high-waisted dark pleated trousers, a belt, and a hanging chain accessory. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft dark square gradient censor block, while the rest of her body and outfit remain detailed. Place her in the foreground slightly right of center, standing beside a reflective silver-gray vintage car with the driver-side door area and side mirror visible. In the background, show exactly 6 tall palm trees at varying distances, telephone poles and wires along the left side, low roadside buildings, a few small birds in the sky, and glowing pink clouds against a turquoise dusk sky. Use dramatic rim lighting, glossy reflections on the car and jacket, detailed anime linework, painterly shading, high contrast neon glow, wide landscape composition, and a nostalgic vaporwave atmosphere. No watermark, no extra readable text besides the motel sign and vacancy sign.
